items.reason: New core sampler tests cover derivation, invalid config rejection, threshold decisions, random distribution, disabled fast path, FATAL pass-through, and concurrent config/hot-path reads.
New config tests cover LogSampleConfigPb parsing/publication, all-1.0 disable folding, previous-good retention, request-only derivation, and no-arg request sampled-in behavior.
New access tests cover access/request_out classification, sampled-in OR semantics, sampled-out skips, logSampled marker formatting, and lazy access recorder construction patterns.
New macro integration tests exercise LOG/PLOG/VLOG lazy evaluation, diagnostic supplement sampling, sampled-in forced diagnostics, background bypass, and FATAL/CHECK retention.
Updated RPC metadata tests cover LOG_SAMPLE_UNDECIDED/ADMIT/REJECT propagation semantics for sampler-enabled and disabled request traces.
Updated performance tests cover 4000 QPS/32-thread request sampling, pass-through overhead, reject fast path, access recorder sampled-out cost, and sampler-only decision latency.

The PR adds transactional dynamic sampler flag handling in Flags::UpdateFlagParameter, but this touched test only changes whitespace and does not cover valid batch commits, invalid rollback, or explicit-state derivation through the flag layer.
The new ST checks register-time config presence but does not exercise the changed heartbeat path that reapplies LogSampleConfigPb on later HeartbeatRspPb updates.
